title: Gayatri Waterfalls
tagline: Gayatri Waterfalls — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Gayatri Waterfalls is one of the several waterfalls around Adilabad district, along with Kuntala Waterfall and Pochera Falls.
overview.description: Gayatri Waterfalls is one of the several waterfalls around Adilabad district, along with Kuntala Waterfall and Pochera Falls. The waterfall is situated in a remote, forested area and is located approximately 5 km from Tarnam Khurd, near Neredigonda in Adilabad district of the Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: Sadarmat Barrage
topPlaces.description: Sadarmat Barrage is an under-construction barrage across Godavari River at Ponkal village, Mamda mandal, Nirmal district of Telangana State. This barrage is situated 32 km downstream of Sriram Sagar Project, on the Godavari river and about 7 km upstream of Sadarmat Anicut.

topPlaces.name: Khanapur, Nirmal
topPlaces.description: Khanapur is a town in Nirmal district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a Municipality with 12 electoral wards, Mandal, Assembly Constituency and Revenue Division in Nirmal District.

items.note: Sadarmat Barrage is an under-construction barrage across Godavari River at Ponkal village, Mamda mandal, Nirmal district of Telangana State. This barrage is situated 32 km downstream of Sriram Sagar Project, on the Godavari river and about 7 km upstream of Sadarmat Anicut.
Khanapur is a town in Nirmal district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is a Municipality with 12 electoral wards, Mandal, Assembly Constituency and Revenue Division in Nirmal District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gayatri Waterfalls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gayatri Waterfalls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gayatri Waterfalls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (134 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (176 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gayatri Waterfalls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gayatri Waterfalls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gayatri Waterfalls?
faq.a: Stays in Gayatri Waterfalls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gayatri Waterfalls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sadarmat Barrage, Khanapur, Nirmal.
